outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel starts a tense ceasefire in Lebanon, as Trump sounds optimistic on Iran talks
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire taking effect amid immediate violations. Trump signals talks could resume 'this weekend' in Islamabad.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump declares Israel 'PROHIBITED' from bombing Lebanon, rebuking Netanyahu publicly
outlets.summary: WaPo reports on unprecedented public US-Israel rift: Trump's Truth Social post overruling Netanyahu's claim that Hezbollah fight 'not over.' Pentagon officials quoted on Hegseth's rhetoric 'contradicting reality.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth warns Iranian leaders: 'Choose wisely,' US 'locked and loaded'
outlets.summary: Fox News highlights Hegseth's ultimatum to Iran. Defense Secretary warns US is ready to strike energy and electrical infrastructure if Iran refuses a deal.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Trump declares Iran war is 'very close to being over'
outlets.summary: Fox Business highlights Trump's optimistic Las Vegas remarks that Iran deal is 'very close.' Markets rallied on comments — S&P 500 hit new intraday record 7,038. Second round of talks expected this weekend.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Celebrations in Lebanon as ceasefire begins; Iran opens Hormuz for commercial traffic
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers celebrations in Beirut, Iran's Hormuz opening, ceasefire violations, and Macron-Starmer Hormuz summit with 30 nations.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Macron and Starmer host ~30-nation Hormuz summit — France and UK refuse to join US blockade
outlets.summary: BBC covers the Macron-Starmer Hormuz coalition summit in London. ~30 nations commit to 'Strictly Defensive' naval mission. France and UK explicitly refuse to join US blockade of Iranian ports. US was NOT invited. Military planning meeting next week.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: PM said to tell ministers he agreed to ceasefire at Trump's request — cabinet shocked
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reports ministers were furious after learning of the Lebanon ceasefire from media. Netanyahu held no cabinet vote.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: After PM claims Hezbollah fight not over, Trump says Israel 'PROHIBITED' from bombing Lebanon
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers extraordinary public US-Israel split. Netanyahu said Hezbollah fight 'not over' and Lebanon excluded from ceasefire. Trump Truth Social response: Israel PROHIBITED from Lebanon strikes. Iran and Pakistani mediators side with Trump.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: People's steadfastness forced aggressors to retreat during 40-day war
outlets.summary: Press TV frames the war as Iranian victory. Pezeshkian calls for producing narratives about 'achievements during the 40-day resistance.' Hormuz declared open for commercial traffic.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: Iran will only continue talks within framework of international law
outlets.summary: Press TV covers Pezeshkian's warning that any threat to the Strait of Hormuz 'would have widespread consequences for the world.' Iran frames Hormuz opening as goodwill gesture while insisting on sovereign control.
